_description: Vulnerability allowlist for pnpm audit. Each entry documents a known vulnerability that has been reviewed and accepted with justification.

allowlist.justification: Transitive dependency of @prisma/dev (Prisma CLI tooling). Not used in application code — hono's serveStatic middleware is not invoked. Prisma 7.8.0 pins @prisma/dev@0.24.3 which pins @hono/node-server@1.19.11. Fix requires Prisma to release an update.

_entrySchema.justification: Why this vulnerability is accepted (e.g., dev-only dependency, not reachable in production)
_entrySchema.reviewDate: ISO date when the vulnerability was last reviewed (YYYY-MM-DD)
_entrySchema.nextReviewDate: ISO date when the vulnerability should be re-evaluated (YYYY-MM-DD)
